## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Learning / Product Impact

What learning loop, dashboard evidence, AI behavior, or maintenance path does this affect?

## Tests

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Added or updated focused tests when learning logic changed

## Data and Privacy

- [ ] No API keys or secrets are included
- [ ] No real student names, school data, screenshots, or private learning records are included
- [ ] Fixtures and screenshots use synthetic/generic data only

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out any risky areas, migrations, AI prompt changes, mastery/FSRS behavior changes, or dashboard calculation changes.
